name: JellyTag
description: Automatically overlays quality badges (resolution, HDR, codec, audio, source) on media posters and thumbnails. Modified to support .strm files by parsing filenames for metadata.
overview: Quality badges for .strm files - parses filenames to display resolution, HDR, codecs, audio, and source information directly on posters

versions.changelog:
Bug fixes:
- Fixed middleware registration (badges now actually appear!)
- Updated to modern SkiaSharp APIs (no more deprecation warnings)
- First working release

Initial release:
- Filename parsing for .strm files
- Multi-category badge support (resolution, HDR, codecs, audio, source)
- Customizable badge positioning and sizing
- Server-side rendering with caching
- Configuration UI

Note: This version has bugs - use v1.0.1 instead
